message:
feat(tui): integrate SpringManager into dashboard for focus animations

Phase 4b dashboard spring integration (br-27cl0):
- Add dashboardSprings field to Model for centralized animation state
- Add syncFocusAnimations to update focus indicator spring targets
- Integrate spring tick into dashboard update cycle
- Add spring-animated focus opacity for panel transitions
- Refactor local_perf to use springs for performance metrics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
